        have : (1 / (-((n : ℚ) + 2)) ^ 2) = 1 := sub_eq_zero.mp h
        have hne0 : (-((n : ℚ) + 2)) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := pow_ne_zero 2 ht0
        have : (-((n : ℚ) + 2)) ^ 2 = 1 := by
          -- invert both sides
          have := congrArg (fun t => (t)⁻¹) this
          simpa [inv_one, inv_div, one_div, hne0] using this
        -- but (-((n+2)))^2 ≥ 4
        have hn : (0 : ℚ) ≤ (n : ℚ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le n)
        have : (4 : ℚ) ≤ (-((n : ℚ) + 2)) ^ 2 := by
          have hn' : (2 : ℚ) ≤ (n : ℚ) + 2 := by linarith
          have habs : (2 : ℚ) ≤ | -((n : ℚ) + 2) | := by
            simpa [abs_neg] using (by
              simpa [abs_of_nonneg (by linarith : (0:ℚ) ≤ (n:ℚ)+2)] using hn')
          have := sq_le_sq.2 habs
          simpa [pow_two] using this
        linarith
      field_simp [pow_two, hden, ht0, hden2]
      ring
  have hinj : Function.Injective f := by
    intro m n h
    have : (-((m : ℚ) + 2)) = (-((n : ℚ) + 2)) := by
      have := congrArg (fun t => t.1) h
      simpa [f] using this
    have : (m : ℚ) = (n : ℚ) := by linarith
    exact_mod_cast this
  -- use infinite image of ℕ under injective map into the set
  refine (Set.infinite_iff_injective_forall_mem.2 ?_)
  refine ⟨f, hinj, ?_⟩
  intro n
  exact hf_mem n

classical
  have hinj : Function.Injective (fun t : {q : ℚ // q ≠ 0 ∧ q ≠ 1} => (t.1, t.1, (t.1 ^ 2)⁻¹)) := by
    intro a b h
    have : (a.1 : ℚ) = b.1 := by
      simpa using congrArg (fun p : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ => p.1) h
    exact Subtype.ext this
  refine (Set.infinite_range_of_injective hinj).mono ?_
  intro x hx
  rcases hx with ⟨t, rfl⟩
  refine ⟨t.1, t.1, (t.1 ^ 2)⁻¹, ?_, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
  · refine ⟨t.2.2, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact t.2.2
    · have : (t.1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := t.2.1
      have : (t.1 ^ 2 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by
        exact pow_ne_zero 2 this
      exact inv_ne_one.2 this
  · have hx0 : (t.1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := t.2.1
    have hx0' : (t.1 ^ 2 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := pow_ne_zero 2 hx0
    simp [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, hx0', inv_mul_cancel]
  · have hx0 : (t.1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := t.2.1
    have hx0' : (t.1 ^ 2 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := pow_ne_zero 2 hx0
    have hx1 : (t.1 : ℚ) - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.2 t.2.2
    have hx1' : ((t.1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := pow_ne_zero 2 hx1
    have hx1'' : ((t.1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 4 ≠ 0 := pow_ne_zero 2 hx1'
    have hz1 : ((t.1 ^ 2)⁻¹ : ℚ) - 1 ≠ 0 := by
      have hne : (t.1 ^ 2)⁻¹ ≠ (1 : ℚ) := by
        exact inv_ne_one.2 hx0'
      simpa [sub_ne_zero] using hne
    have hz1' : (((t.1 ^ 2)⁻¹ : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := pow_ne_zero 2 hz1
    have hId : (t.1 ^ 2)⁻¹ - 1 = -((t.1 ^ 2 - 1) / (t.1 ^ 2)) := by
      field_simp [hx0']
    have hzfrac :
        ((t.1 ^ 2)⁻¹ : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((t.1 ^ 2)⁻¹ : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 =
          1 / (t.1 ^ 2 - 1) ^ 2 := by
      have hxt : (t.1 ^ 2 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := hx0'
      field_simp [hId, hxt]
    have hxfrac :
        (t.1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((t.1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 = t.1 ^ 2 / (t.1 - 1) ^ 2 := by rfl
    have hx2 :
        (t.1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((t.1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 =
          t.1 ^ 2 * (t.1 + 1) ^ 2 / (t.1 ^ 2 - 1) ^ 2 := by
      have : (t.1 ^ 2 - 1 : ℚ) = (t.1 - 1) * (t.1 + 1) := by ring
      have hne : (t.1 ^ 2 - 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        have : (t.1 - 1 : ℚ) = 0 ∨ (t.1 + 1 : ℚ) = 0 := by
          have := congrArg (fun u => u) (by simpa [this] using h)
          exact mul_eq_zero.mp (by simpa [this] using h)
        cases this with
        | inl h0 =>
            exact (hx1 (by simpa using h0)).elim
        | inr h0 =>
            have : (t.1 : ℚ) = -1 := by linarith
            have : (t.1 ^ 2 : ℚ) = 1 := by simpa [this] using (by ring : ((-1 : ℚ)^2) = 1)
            exact (hne (by simpa [this] using (by ring : (1:ℚ) - 1 = 0))).elim
      field_simp [this]
    have hxsum :
        (t.1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((t.1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (t.1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((t.1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 =
          2 * (t.1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((t.1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 := by
      ring
    have hfinal :
        2 * (t.1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((t.1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + ((t.1 ^ 2)⁻¹ : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((t.1 ^ 2)⁻¹ : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      -- identity holds for x=y=t, z=1/x^2
      have hne : (t.1 ^ 2 - 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        have : (t.1 : ℚ) = 1 ∨ (t.1 : ℚ) = -1 := by
          have : (t.1 ^ 2 : ℚ) = 1 := by linarith
          have : (t.1 : ℚ) = 1 ∨ (t.1 : ℚ) = -1 := by
            have := sq_eq_one_iff.mp this
            simpa using this
          exact this
        cases this with
        | inl h1 =>
            exact (t.2.2 (by simpa using h1)).elim
        | inr h1 =>
            have : (t.1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := t.2.1
            exact this (by linarith)
      field_simp [hzfrac, hxsum, hne]
      ring
    simpa [hxfrac, hxsum, hzfrac] using hfinal

classical
  refine (Set.infinite_image_iff ?_).2 ?_
  · intro a b ha hb h
    simpa [ha, hb] using congrArg Prod.fst (congrArg Prod.fst h)
  ·
    have : (Set.Infinite ({x : ℚ | x ≠ 1} : Set ℚ)) := by
      simpa using (Set.infinite_univ.diff (Set.finite_singleton (1 : ℚ)))
    refine this.mono ?_
    intro x hx
    refine ⟨(x, 1 / x, 1), ?_, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · refine ⟨hx, ?_, by norm_num⟩
      have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro hx0
        apply hx
        simpa [hx0] 
      have : (1 / x : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
        intro h
        have : (1 : ℚ) = x := by
          have := congrArg (fun t : ℚ => t * x) h
          simpa [hx0] using this
        exact hx this.symm
      exact this
    ·
      have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro hx0
        apply hx
        simpa [hx0]
      field_simp [hx0]
    ·
      have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro hx0
        apply hx
        simpa [hx0]
      have hxe : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 = (1 : ℚ) := by
        have : x ^ 2 = (x - 1) ^ 2 := by
          calc
            x ^ 2 = (x - 1 + 1) ^ 2 := by ring
            _ = (x - 1) ^ 2 + 2 * (x - 1) + 1 := by ring
            _ = (x - 1) ^ 2 := by ring_nf
        have hx1 : (x - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
          have : x - 1 ≠ 0 := by
            intro h
            apply hx
            linarith
          exact pow_ne_zero 2 this
        exact by
          field_simp [hx1]
          simpa [this]
      have hye : (1 / x) ^ 2 / ((1 / x) - 1) ^ 2 = 0 := by
        have : (1 / x) ^ 2 = 0 := by
          have : (1 / x : ℚ) = 0 := by
            field_simp [hx0]
          simpa [this]
        simp [this]
      simp [hxe, hye]

classical
  let f : ℚ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun t => (t, (t - 1) / t, (t - 1) / (t - 1))
  have hf_inj : Function.Injective f := by
    intro a b hab
    have : (a, (a - 1) / a, (a - 1) / (a - 1)) = (b, (b - 1) / b, (b - 1) / (b - 1)) := hab
    exact congrArg (fun p => p.1) this
  refine (Set.infinite_range_of_injective f hf_inj).mono ?_
  intro p hp
  rcases hp with ⟨t, rfl⟩
  refine ⟨t, (t - 1) / t, (t - 1) / (t - 1), ?_, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
  · refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro ht
      have : t - 1 = 0 := by simpa [ht]
      linarith
    · intro hyt
      have ht0 : t ≠ 0 := by
        intro ht0
        have : (t - 1) / t = 0 := by simpa [ht0] using (show (t - 1) / t = (t - 1) / t from rfl)
        have : False := by
          have : (0 : ℚ) = (1 : ℚ) := by
            have : (t - 1) = (1 : ℚ) := by
              have : t - 1 = -1 := by simpa [ht0]
              simpa [this]
            simpa using this
          exact zero_ne_one this
        exact (this.elim)
      have : (t - 1) = t := by
        have := congrArg (fun u => u * t) hyt
        simpa [mul_div_cancel' (t - 1) ht0, one_mul] using this
      linarith
    · intro hzt
      have : (t - 1) / (t - 1) = (1 : ℚ) := by simpa using hzt
      have : t - 1 ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        have : ((t - 1) / (t - 1) : ℚ) = 0 := by simpa [h]
        simpa [this] using (show ((t - 1) / (t - 1) : ℚ) = (1 : ℚ) from rfl)
      simpa [div_self this] using this
  · have ht0 : t ≠ 0 := by
      intro ht0
      have : t * ((t - 1) / t) * ((t - 1) / (t - 1)) = 0 := by
        simp [ht0]
      simpa [ht0] using this
    have ht1 : t - 1 ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      have : t = 1 := by linarith
      have : (t - 1) / (t - 1) = (0 : ℚ) := by simp [h]
      have : (t - 1) / (t - 1) = (1 : ℚ) := by simp [div_self, h]
      exact one_ne_zero (by simpa [this] using this)
    simp [f, h₁, ht0, ht1, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, div_mul_eq_mul_div, mul_div_cancel' (t - 1) ht0, div_self ht1]
  · simp

classical
  refine (Set.infinite_image_iff ?f).2 ?_
  · intro a b hab
    exact congrArg (fun t => t.1) hab
  · have hinj : Function.Injective fun x : ℚ => ((x, (x - 1) / x), (-1 / (x - 1))) := by
      intro a b hab
      simpa using congrArg Prod.fst hab
    have hbase : Set.Infinite {x : ℚ | x ≠ 0 ∧ x ≠ 1} := by
      simpa [Set.infinite_coe_iff] using (Set.infinite_univ.subtype (s := {x : ℚ | x = 0 ∨ x = 1})).mono ?_
    · refine (hinj.infinite_image ?_).mono ?_
      · exact hbase
      · intro t ht
        rcases ht with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
        refine ⟨x, (x - 1) / x, -1 / (x - 1), ?_, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
        · refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
          · exact (hx.2)
          · have : (x - 1) / x ≠ 1 := by
              intro h
              have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := hx.1
              have := congrArg (fun q : ℚ => q * x) h
              simp [div_eq_mul_inv, hx0] at this
              exact hx.2 (by linarith)
            exact this
          · have : (-1 / (x - 1) : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
              intro h
              have hx1 : x - 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith [hx.2]
              have := congrArg (fun q : ℚ => q * (x - 1)) h
              simp [div_eq_mul_inv, hx1] at this
              linarith
            exact this
        · have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := hx.1
          have hx1 : x - 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith [hx.2]
          field_simp [hx0, hx1]
        · have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := hx.1
          have hx1 : x - 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith [hx.2]
          field_simp [hx0, hx1]
    · intro x hx
      exact hx
